Hibernate: alter table flowers drop constraint if exists FKet4ju9bpvd0jdlripp0i7600q Hibernate: alter table order_items drop constraint if exists FKgcld7l1l15xokg344c58xnur2 Hibernate: alter table order_items drop constraint if exists FKbioxgbv59vetrxe0ejfubep1w Hibernate: drop table if exists accounts Hibernate: drop table if exists cart_items Hibernate: drop table if exists categories Hibernate: drop table if exists flowers Hibernate: drop table if exists order_items Hibernate: drop table if exists orders Hibernate: drop table if exists summary Hibernate: create table accounts (account_id int identity not null, password varchar(255), role varchar(255), user_name varchar(255), primary key (account_id)) Hibernate: create table cart_items (account_id int, flower_id int not null, quantity int, id bigint identity not null, selected_style varchar(500), session_id varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table categories (category_id int identity not null, category_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (category_id)) Hibernate: create table flowers (category_id int not null, flower_id int identity not null, price float(53), stock int default 0 not null, description varchar(1000), additional_images varchar(2000), flower_name varchar(255) not null, image_path varchar(255), primary key (flower_id)) Hibernate: create table order_items (flower_id int not null, order_id int not null, price_at_purchase float(53), quantity int, id bigint identity not null, selected_style varchar(500), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table orders (delivery_date date, order_date date, order_id int identity not null, total_amount float(53), created_at datetime2(6), address varchar(255) not null, customer_name varchar(255) not null, note varchar(255), payment_status varchar(255), phone varchar(255) not null, transaction_id varchar(255), primary key (order_id)) Hibernate: create table summary (summary_date date not null, summary_id int identity not null, total_income float(53) not null, total_orders int not null, created_at datetime2(6), primary key (summary_id)) Hibernate: alter table cart_items add constraint FKhu7yrgm18fpcjyw1vcimil0fl foreign key (account_id) references accounts Hibernate: alter table cart_items add constraint FKs7t296bs4k6xnaoto1kooy71 foreign key (flower_id) references flowers Hibernate: alter table flowers add constraint FKet4ju9bpvd0jdlripp0i7600q foreign key (category_id) references categories Hibernate: alter table order_items add constraint FKgcld7l1l15xokg344c58xnur2 foreign key (flower_id) references flowers Hibernate: alter table order_items add constraint FKbioxgbv59vetrxe0ejfubep1w foreign key (order_id) references orders 2026-07-24T01:05:25.136+07:00 INFO
